step.name: wave-1-proof-of-concept
step.action: Port ONE representative feature end-to-end. Build parity tests for it. Demonstrate the new framework can hold the existing surface.
step.decision-gate: If parity fails for the PoC module, the entire migration plan needs re-evaluation — different target or different approach.

step.name: wave-2-parallel-build
step.action: Port modules in priority order. Each module: codemod where mechanical, hand-port edge cases, write parity tests, ship behind flag. Dual-run in CI. Time-box max 12 weeks.

step.name: wave-3-cutover
step.input: All modules ported + parity tests green + rollback drill executed
step.action: Flip flag default to new framework. Old framework remains as fallback. Monitor metrics + error rate for 1-2 weeks.

step.name: wave-4-decommission
step.action: Remove old framework dep. Delete legacy code. Remove flags. Update docs.
step.decision-gate: If anyone resists decommission ('just keep it'), surface the technical debt cost; require an ADR to keep it.
